statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); context_remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); git_branch=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git describe --tags --exact-match 2>/dev/null || GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); git_dirty=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null; if [ $? -eq 1 ]; then echo '±'; fi); output="$(printf '\033[96m')$user@$host$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[94m')$dir$(printf '\033[0m')"; if [ -n "$git_branch" ]; then if [ -n "$git_dirty" ]; then output="$output $(printf '\033[93m')⎇ $git_branch$git_dirty$(printf '\033[0m')"; else output="$output $(printf '\033[92m')⎇ $git_branch$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$context_remaining" ]; then output="$output $(printf '\033[90m')[ctx: ${context_remaining}%]$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; echo "$output"
